channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Supreme Court petition seeks CBI inquiry into alleged irregularities linked to Cockroach Janta Party movement
item.description: A petition has been filed in the Supreme Court of India seeking a Central Bureau of Investigation (CBI) probe into the activities associated with the online satirical movement called the 'Cockroach Ja...

item.title: U.S. Treasury issues subpoenas to Hasan Piker and Medea Benjamin over Cuba humanitarian aid trip
item.description: The U.S. Treasury Department has reportedly issued subpoenas to Twitch streamer Hasan Piker and CodePink co-founder Medea Benjamin in connection with their March trip to Cuba, according to reporting c...

item.title: Castellanos scores headed goal as West Ham stay in contention against Leeds
item.description: West Ham kept their hopes alive in an important Premier League clash after Valentín Castellanos scored with a header against Leeds. The Argentine forward found the net with West Ham’s opening goal, gi...

item.title: Early Childhood and Family Background of Humphrey Bogart
item.description: This article explores the early life and family background of Humphrey Bogart, one of the most iconic figures of classic Hollywood cinema. Born on Christmas Day in 1899 in New York City, Bogart—often ...

item.title: Gavin Hunt begins rebuilding Stellenbosch FC after narrowly missing MTN8 qualification
item.description: Stellenbosch FC head coach Gavin Hunt has set his sights on rebuilding the squad ahead of the new season after his side narrowly missed out on MTN8 qualification on the final day of the Betway Premier...

item.title: Keir Starmer condemns sentencing in Hampshire teen rape case as authorities review decision
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer has described as “appalling” a court case in which three teenage boys convicted of raping two girls were spared custodial sentences. The offences took place in Hampshir...

item.title: Rangers International FC clinch 2025/2026 NPFL title after final-day win over Ikorodu City
item.description: Rangers International FC have emerged champions of the 2025/2026 Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) season after a tense and decisive 2-1 victory over Ikorodu City FC on the final day of the campa...

item.title: Melpadi villagers protest road blockade over irregular drinking water supply near Katpadi
item.description: Residents of Melpadi village near Katpadi in Vellore district staged a road blockade on Sunday demanding immediate restoration of regular drinking water supply. The protest took place on the Tiruvalam...

item.title: Ghanaian Actress Beverly Afaglo Passes Away at 42, Husband Choirmaster Shares Emotional Tribute
item.description: The Ghanaian film industry is in deep mourning after the sudden death of popular actress Beverly Afaglo. She passed away on 24 May 2026 at the age of 42, just four days before her birthday on 28 May. ...

item.title: DMW confirms 38 OFWs on hantavirus-exposed ship test negative and show no symptoms
item.description: The Department of Migrant Workers (DMW) reported that 38 Overseas Filipino Workers (OFWs) who were aboard a vessel previously linked to hantavirus concerns have tested negative for the virus and are c...

item.title: Enugu Rangers Win Ninth NPFL Title After Beating Ikorodu City 2-1 on Final Day
item.description: Na so Enugu Rangers don finally clinch their ninth Nigeria Premier Football League title after dem beat Ikorodu City 2-1 for Lagos on the last match day of the season. The Flying Antelopes finish with...

item.title: 2026 Canadian Grand Prix starting grid and championship standings ahead of Montreal race
item.description: The article outlines the starting grid, championship standings, and key context ahead of the 2026 Canadian Grand Prix in Montreal. Despite the original headline referencing Miami, the content focuses ...

item.title: Russia launches large-scale missile and drone assault on Ukraine, including Oreshnik missile
item.description: Russia carried out one of its most extensive aerial assaults on Ukraine since the beginning of the war, launching a massive wave of missiles and drones overnight. According to Ukrainian officials, app...

item.title: Barbie Imperial discusses the key qualities behind her role as Jamilah in “Blood vs Duty”
item.description: ABS-CBN featured actress Barbie Imperial and her portrayal of Jamilah Abubakar in the television drama “Blood vs Duty.” The article highlights three important and inspiring traits that help define Jam...

item.title: White House economic adviser says potential Iran deal could reduce oil prices and ease inflation pressures
item.description: National Economic Council Director Kevin Hassett said on Fox News Sunday that there are emerging signs of easing inflation, largely tied to expectations surrounding a potential U.S.-Iran agreement. He...

item.title: Arsenal end Premier League season as champions while West Ham are relegated and Spurs secure survival
item.description: Arsenal rounded off their Premier League title-winning campaign with a confident 2-1 victory over Crystal Palace at Selhurst Park, finishing on 85 points and seven clear of Manchester City. Goals from...

item.title: Tanzania burns over 500kg of heroin after Iranian trafficker receives 30-year prison sentence
item.description: Authorities in Tanzania have destroyed more than 500 kilogrammes of heroin following the sentencing of an Iranian national convicted of international drug trafficking. The destruction exercise was car...

item.title: Scottie Thompson leads Barangay Ginebra to victory over Rain or Shine in PBA matchup
item.description: Barangay Ginebra secured an important win over Rain or Shine in their PBA clash, powered by a strong performance from Scottie Thompson. According to the report by ABS-CBN News, Thompson stepped up off...

item.title: Malaysian higher education delegation to host three-day education expo in Dar es Salaam
item.description: Dar es Salaam is set to host a major international education event from June 1 to June 3, 2026, where a high-level delegation from Malaysia will engage Tanzanian students and education stakeholders. T...

item.title: MAGA physician and Laura Loomer clash over leaked text messages in public dispute
item.description: A public dispute erupted on social media involving Dr. Mary Talley Bowden, a physician aligned with MAGA circles, and far-right activist Laura Loomer. The controversy began when Bowden posted screensh...
